content: Ihi, ma yebɣa yiwen ad yaru tutlayt taqbaylit akken i iwata, tuwi-d fell-as ad yissin ilugan n tira n teqbaylit.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Talwit (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
